requirements.label: Authenticated developer identity
requirements.description: Developer Mode requires a signed-in Neuroartan profile before runtime access can be trusted.

requirements.label: Developer role or capability flag
requirements.description: A backend-owned developer capability flag must authorize access before runtime execution is enabled.

requirements.label: Provider preference
requirements.description: The frontend may select a provider route, but connection, secrets, and execution remain backend-owned.

requirements.label: Repository access eligibility
requirements.description: Repository authorization must be scoped per repository through backend-held GitHub App or OAuth credentials.

requirements.label: Runtime access status
requirements.description: Scan, patch, test, commit, and pull request execution are blocked until secure backend runtime routes exist.

requirements.label: Approval attribution
requirements.description: All mutation approvals must record the approving profile, provider, repository, patch artifact, and execution trace.
